text: Aspire 13.2.4 lands a same-week patch for CVE-2026-40894, an allocation-amplification DoS in OpenTelemetry .NET. The baggage, b3, and uber-trace-id parsers split on delimiters before validating length, so 5000 commas in a header materialize thousands of empty Gen0 strings. Pin OpenTelemetry.Api and Propagators to 1.15.3.
